name: DORIS
description: Deep Ocean Research and Imaging System - Passive thrusterless deep-ocean lander

notes.lights: Lights 1 on SERVO13 (function 181), controlled via RC channel 9
notes.relay: Drop-weight relay on SERVO14 via ArduPilot relay subsystem (DORIS_RELAY_CH=0)
notes.relay_setup: RELAY1_FUNCTION=1 enables relay 1 (requires reboot). RELAY1_PIN=14 assigns it to SERVO14 and must be set after reboot once the relay driver has initialised.
notes.rangefinder: RNGFND1_TYPE=0 explicitly disables the rangefinder to prevent LASER_POSITION prearm failures
notes.ekf_source: ArduSub defaults EK3_SRC1 to ExternalNav (3) for DVL setups. DORIS needs GPS at the surface for pre-arm, so POSXY and VELXY are set to GPS (1). FS_EKF_ACTION=0 handles the expected GPS loss underwater.
